untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders pattern requires precise identification of three distinct peaks with the center peak higher than both shoulders, and a neckline drawn through two troughs. This multi-bar structural pattern with specific geometric relationships cannot be fully expressed through single-bar indicator conditions. The neckline slope direction (noted as a severity predictor) also requires vector calculation not available in the indicator set. Converted approximation uses price breakout below range low with confirmation, but this does not capture the full pattern structure.
